target_audience: A framework operator deciding whether explicit user or operator rejection can overturn an internally green runtime path and change the next loop.
expected_runtime_effect: An internally green path should not remain final after operator rejection.
The rejection should be recorded as outcome failure evidence tied to the reopened session.
The learning loop should retain the rejection as the next improvement focus.
additional_runtime_note: The learning-loop snapshot now tolerates unreadable legacy session artifacts and still captures the latest valid rejection outcome.
